COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SHERIFF'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET (CONFIDENTIAL)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT BARBARA J. PLANK IS DENIED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR BARBARA J. PLANK HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT SHE NEEDS ALL OF HER EARNINGS FOR THE SUPPORT OF HERSELF AND HER FAMILY. HER MONTHLY INCOME EXCEEDS HER MONTHLY EXPENSES. THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE WAGES OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BARBARA J. PLANK SHALL BE GARNISHED AT $ 524.00 PER PAY PERIOD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN #8189. (302)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara J. Plank, defendant in Propria Persona; No other appearances.

RULING: CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of defendant Barbara J. Plank is denied. Judgment Debtor Barbara J. Plank has not demonstrated that she needs all of her earnings for the support of herself and her family. Her monthly income exceeds her monthly expenses. The Sheriff is directed to release any earnings to Judgment Creditor Capital One Bank (USA) N.A for payment on the judgment. The wages of Judgment Debtor Barbara J. Plank shall be garnished at $ 524.00 per pay period. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Carol Karen #8189.
